headline: Parker to Announce Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Earnings on April 30; Conference Call and Webcast Scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern
summary: CLEVELAND, April 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it will release its fiscal 2026 third quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, April 30, 2026, followed by a conference call at 11:00 a.m., Eastern time. During the call, the company will discuss fiscal 2026 third quarter results and respond to questions from institutional investors and security analysts. The conference call

headline: Howmet Gains From Strength in Defense Aerospace: Can the Momentum Last?
summary: HWM rides strong defense aerospace demand, with rising revenues and robust military spending supporting continued growth momentum ahead.

headline: Parker-Hannifin (PH) Valuation Check After Strong Momentum And Premium P/E Multiple
summary: What Parker-Hannifin’s recent performance means for investors Parker-Hannifin (PH) has drawn fresh attention after a strong run in the stock, with the share price up around 11% over the past month and about 5% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Parker-Hannifin. The recent move adds to a wider upswing, with a 30 day share price return of 11.2% and a year to date share price return of 10.7%, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 75.3%.
